simple_types.name: APPROTECT_PALL_Field
simple_types.code:
type APPROTECT_PALL_Field is
   Enabled,
   Disabled)
  with Size => 8;

simple_types.name: DEBUGCTRL_CPUFPBEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type DEBUGCTRL_CPUFPBEN_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 8;

simple_types.name: DEBUGCTRL_CPUNIDEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type DEBUGCTRL_CPUNIDEN_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 8;

enumeration_literals.name: Disabled
enumeration_literals.description: Enable CPU ITM and ETM functionality (default behavior)

simple_types.name: NFCPINS_PROTECT_Field
simple_types.code:
type NFCPINS_PROTECT_Field is
   Disabled,
   Nfc)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Disabled
enumeration_literals.description: Operation as NFC antenna pins. Configures the protection for NFC operation

simple_types.name: PSELRESET_CONNECT_Field
simple_types.code:
type PSELRESET_CONNECT_Field is
   Connected,
   Disconnected)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: REGOUT0_VOUT_Field
simple_types.code:
type REGOUT0_VOUT_Field is
   Val_1V8,
   Val_2V1,
   Val_2V4,
   Val_2V7,
   Val_3V0,
   Val_3V3,
   Default)
  with Size => 3;

array_types.name: CUSTOMER_Registers
array_types.code: type CUSTOMER_Registers is array (0 .. 31) of Interfaces.NRF52.UInt32;

array_types.name: NRFFW_Registers
array_types.code: type NRFFW_Registers is array (0 .. 14) of Interfaces.NRF52.UInt32;

array_types.name: NRFHW_Registers
array_types.code: type NRFHW_Registers is array (0 .. 11) of Interfaces.NRF52.UInt32;

array_types.name: PSELRESET_Registers
array_types.code: type PSELRESET_Registers is array (0 .. 1) of PSELRESET_Register;

record_types.name: APPROTECT_Register
DEBUGCTRL_Register

fields.name: CPUNIDEN
fields.description: Configure CPU flash patch and breakpoint (FPB) unit behavior

record_types.name: NFCPINS_Register
PSELRESET_Register

fields.name: PIN
fields.description: Port number onto which nRESET is exposed

record_types.name: REGOUT0_Register
UICR_Peripheral

fields.name: UNUSED3
fields.description: Description collection[n]: Reserved for Nordic firmware design

fields.name: NRFFW
fields.description: Description collection[n]: Reserved for Nordic hardware design

fields.name: CUSTOMER
fields.description: Description collection[n]: Mapping of the nRESET function

fields.name: APPROTECT
fields.description: Setting of pins dedicated to NFC functionality: NFC antenna or GPIO

fields.name: DEBUGCTRL
fields.description:
GPIO reference voltage / external output supply voltage in high
voltage mode

variables.name: UICR_Periph
variables.code:
UICR_Periph : aliased UICR_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => UICR_Base;
